chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2106 of 2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of main case. 22.04.2025 Ms.Ayesha, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Muhammad Ali Waris Lari, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Saad Siddiqui, Advocate for the Respondent Nos.2 and 3 (K-Electric) Ms.Mehreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. Per learned counsel for the Respondent Nos.2 and 3 (K-Electric), the petitioner is seeking relief against the private respondents and seeks to agitate disputed questions that are not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Even otherwise, it is submitted that any relationship with the respondents is contractual in nature and the same cannot be enforced in writ jurisdiction. Be that as it may, this petition is pending since 2023 without any significant progress and even today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of petitioner’s counsel for no cogent reason. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Nasir
